workers.purpose: Validate heterogeneous topology proof, capture optimize guidance, and bundle architecture-ready artifacts.
command_surfaces: python -m sdetkit kits optimize --goal "integration topology premium gate alignment" --format json
review_notes: Do not infer automation, patch application, merge authorization, or semantic equivalence from this evidence.

workers.purpose: Keep worker templates aligned with the repo's expansion plan, automation coverage, and template inventory.
review_notes: Use expand.json to compare expansion guidance against the worker inventory.
Use automation-check.json to keep automation health visible.
Use templates.json to detect worker inventory drift.

recommended_next_actions: Keep this contract as evidence only.
Run the worker templates before topology/platform/premium-gate refactors.
Review generated artifacts before any human-authored patch.
Do not auto-apply workflow, platform, or topology changes from this report.
